  • Overview

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ActionStatus
Represents a snapshot of an action or subsystem's state at a specific point in time.
Binding
A functional interface used to encapsulate controller button or trigger bindings.
Blackboard
 
BlackboardKey<T>
A strongly-typed key used to read and write data to the Blackboard.
Builder<T>
A generic interface for constructing complex subsystems or modules within the MARS framework.
CompositeData<T extends CompositeData<T>>
The foundational data structure for complex subsystems that are composed of multiple distinct sub-modules (e.g., a Swerve Drive containing four individual Swerve Modules).
CompositeIO<D extends CompositeData<D>>
A specialized IO interface designed to manage hardware interactions for composite subsystems.
CompositeSubsystem<D extends CompositeData<D>,A extends CompositeIO<D>>
A specialized subsystem class for complex mechanisms composed of multiple smaller subsystems.
ControllerContainer
A utility class containing standardized data records for generic controller inputs.
ControllerContainer.ActionButtons
Represents the primary action face buttons mapped by their physical position.
ControllerContainer.AnalogAxis
Represents the raw continuous values of the analog triggers.
ControllerContainer.AnalogTriggers
Represents the analog triggers treated as digital buttons (pressed or not pressed).
ControllerContainer.Bumpers
Represents the top shoulder buttons (L1/R1 or LB/RB).
ControllerContainer.DPadTriggers
Represents the directional pad (D-Pad) or POV hat.
ControllerContainer.SpecialTriggers
Represents the central system or menu buttons.
ControllerContainer.Stick
Represents a 2D joystick/thumbstick.
ControllerOI
The core Operator Interface (OI) abstraction for the MARS framework.
Data<T>
The foundational data structure representing a snapshot of hardware inputs.
DiagnosticPattern
Defines a visual behavior pattern for LEDs or dashboard indicators.
DiagnosticPattern.Style
Available animation styles for the diagnostic pattern.
DiagnosticPayload
A lightweight data carrier representing an evaluated diagnostic state.
Environment
Manages the global execution state of the robot within the MARS framework.
Environment.RunMode
Defines the current execution context of the robot program.
FallbackNode<M extends NodeMessage<M>>
A Null Object pattern implementation for a Node.
GlobalCode
Standard global diagnostic codes used across the MARS framework.
Injector
A utility class responsible for Dependency Injection of IO layers.
IO<T extends Data<T>>
The hardware abstraction layer interface for MARS subsystems.
IRobotContainer
The root container interface for the MARS framework.
MARSAssertionError
A custom runtime exception thrown when a MARS framework test assertion fails.
MarsConstants
 
MARSTest
An annotation used to label and name specific test routines within the MARS framework.
ModularSubsystem<D extends Data<D>,A extends IO<D>>
The core architectural building block of the MARS framework.
Node<M extends NodeMessage<M>>
The core computational unit of the MARS background processing architecture.
NodeMessage<M>
Represents the data payload generated and broadcasted by a Node.
PS5OI
A concrete implementation of the ControllerOI for PlayStation 5 DualSense controllers.
Query
A marker interface representing the input payload for a Service.
Reply
A marker interface representing the output payload from a Service.
Request<P,A>
Represents a specific action or state machine logic block within the MARS framework.
Service<Q extends Query,R extends Reply>
A functional interface representing a synchronous or asynchronous operation that takes a request and returns a computed response.
StatusCode
Represents a generic diagnostic status code within the MARS framework.
StatusCode.Severity
Defines the severity level of a diagnostic status.
SubsystemBuilder<D extends Data<D>,A extends IO<D>>
A fluent builder for constructing ModularSubsystem instances.
Telemetry<D extends Data<D>>
Defines a contract for broadcasting subsystem data to network tables or logging frameworks.
TerminalGCS
The Ground Control Station (GCS) Terminal manager for the MARS framework.
TestRoutine
The abstract base class for defining hardware testing sequences in the MARS framework.
TestScheduler
A utility class responsible for scheduling and executing TestRoutine instances.
XboxOI
A concrete implementation of the ControllerOI for Xbox controllers.
